full_text:
Wan Yu (Wenbin?) 萬彧 (文彬?)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wan Yu (萬彧), styledWenbin? (文彬?). Advised Puyang Xing to make Sun Hao Emperor after Sun Xiu’s death. Wan Yu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Wan Yu lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
